briefdescription.para: Initialize the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance provided by the caller based on the given Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
is the device configuration structure containing information about a specific Mipi_Rx_Phy instance.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: Configure the registers of the Mipi_Rx_Phy instance.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
to one of the registers to be configured
to be set for the particular Handle of the Mipi_Rx_Phy instance

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE If incorrect handle was passed

simplesect.para: There is a limit on the minimum and maximum values of the HS Timeout register.

briefdescription.para: Get if register interface is present from the config structure for specified Mipi_Rx_Phy instance.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.

briefdescription.para: Get information stored in the Mipi_Rx_Phy instance based on the handle passed.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
to one of the registers to be configured

simplesect.para: The value stored in the corresponding register

briefdescription.para: This is used to do a soft reset of the Mipi_Rx_Phy IP instance.

detaileddescription.para: The reset takes approx 20 core clock cycles to become effective.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This is used to clear the Abort Error (Escape or High Speed) bits in the Data Lane 0 through 3.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
represents which Data Lane to act upon
contains information about which bits to reset

briefdescription.para: This is used to get information about Clock Lane status.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: Bitmask containing which of the events have occurred along with the mode of the Clock Lane in Phy

briefdescription.para: This is used to get specific Lane mode information about Clock Lane.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: Bitmask containing mode in which the Clock Lane in Mipi_Rx_Phy is in.

briefdescription.para: This is used to get information about a Data Lane status.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
for which the status is sought for.

simplesect.para: Bitmask containing which of the events have occurred along with the mode of the Data Lane in Phy

briefdescription.para: This is used to get Data Lane Calibration status.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
for which the calib status is sought for.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - Calibration Complete, Calibration packet received XST_NO_DATA - Calibration Complete, Calibration packet is not received XST_FAILURE - Calibration failed

briefdescription.para: This is used to get specific Lane mode information about a Data Lane.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
for which the mode info is requested.

simplesect.para: Bitmask containing mode in which the Data Lane in Mipi_Rx_Phy is in.

briefdescription.para: This is used to get count of packets received on each lane.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
for which the mode info is requested.

simplesect.para: Bitmask containing mode in which the Data Lane in Mipi_Rx_Phy is in.

briefdescription.para: This is used to get Mipi_Rx_Phy Version.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: Returns major and minor Version number of this Mipi_Rx_Phy IP

briefdescription.para: This function is used to enable or disable the Mipi_Rx_Phy core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
denoting whether to enable or disable the Mipi_Rx_Phy core

briefdescription.para: This function configures the dynamic line rate for the MIPI RX PHY by programming the MMCM registers and NPI X5PLL registers.

detaileddescription.para: The driver disables the PHY, programs the MMCM via XMipi_Rx_Phy_MmcmConfig, delegates the PLL register programming to XMipi_Rx_Phy_XPllConfig, and re-enables the PHY.

parameterdescription.para: is the XMipi_Rx_Phy instance to operate on.
is the base address of the X5PLL register space.
is the desired line rate in Mbps (400-4500 Mbps).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if line rate configuration is successful.
XST_FAILURE if the line rate is out of supported range or dynamic line rate is not enabled in hardware.

simplesect.para: The PHY is disabled before MMCM and PLL reprogramming and re-enabled after the sequence completes to ensure a clean transition.
